emails.subject: DRAFT - HAPPY HOUR invitation
emails.body: DRAFT HAPPY HOUR invitation Tana, Per my voicemail, here is the invitation I'm planning on sending out. Plz advise if you have any suggestions/comments and if you'd like me to mail it out to your group or if you'd prefer to do that. I need to provide a final headcount by next Monday, so plz let me know as soon as possible. Thx, Mercy x35082 You are invited to a "Get Acquainted" Happy Hour When: Wednesday, March 7th Time: 6:00 8:00 p.m. Place: Cadillac Bar 1802 Shepherd Drive (713) 862-2020 Please R.S.V.P. by 5 p.m. Monday.
